facebook.caption:
5,028 reviews. 4.7 stars. And somehow Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc still flies under the radar.

Beachfront access at Ông Lang. Two restaurants on-site. A spa and outdoor pool that actually have space. This is the quieter side of the island, and it shows.

If you want the resort experience without the chaos of the south, this is the move.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Poolside at Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc. Ông Lang beach steps away. 4.7 stars across 5,028 reviews. The north side of the island hits different. This is what a low-crowd resort day looks like.
